2026-03-23.content:
You can now [analyze the performance of your deployed applications](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/verify-deployment)
using the monitoring platform of your choice and
[automatically trigger actions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/automation-rules)
such as rollbacks. This feature is now available in
[Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages).

summary.title: Application performance monitoring and automation
summary.summary: You can now analyze the performance of your deployed applications using the monitoring platform of your choice and automatically trigger actions such as rollbacks. This feature is now available in Preview.

2026-03-02.content: Cloud Deploy is now available in the following region: asia-southeast3 (Bangkok)

summary.title: Cloud Deploy now in Bangkok
summary.summary: Cloud Deploy is now available in the asia-southeast3 (Bangkok) region. This expansion brings our deployment capabilities closer to users in Southeast Asia, enabling faster and more reliable application deployments.

2026-02-11.content:
You can now
[deploy containerized workloads to Cloud Run worker pools](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/run-targets#create_your_worker_pool_definitions)
(in [Preview](https://cloud.google.com/products#product-launch-stages)).

summary.title: Deploy containers to Cloud Run worker pools
summary.summary: You can now deploy containerized workloads to Cloud Run worker pools. This new feature is currently in Preview and allows for more flexible deployment options.

2026-01-23.content:
The limit on deployment minutes per delivery pipeline has been removed. The only
quota now enforced in Cloud Deploy is the system limit of 18,000 API
requests per minute per region. [Learn more](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/quotas).

summary.title: Deployment minute limit removed
summary.summary: The previous limit on deployment minutes per delivery pipeline has been removed. The only remaining quota in Cloud Deploy is the system limit of 18,000 API requests per minute per region. This change simplifies quota management for users.

2025-12-12.content:
We now [upgrade the tools used for deployments more frequently](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/select-tool-version).
This includes tools like Skaffold, Kubectl, and Helm. You can also
[select specific versions](https://docs.cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/select-tool-version#how_select) of these
tools when you create a release.

summary.title: Updated deployment tools available
summary.summary: We've updated the deployment tools used in Cloud Deploy, including Skaffold, Kubectl, and Helm, to more recent versions. You can now also select specific tool versions when creating a release, giving you greater control over your deployments.

2025-09-02.content: You can now use custom constraints with Organization Policy to provide more granular control over specific fields for some Cloud Deploy resources. For more information, see [Use custom organization policies](https://cloud.google.com/deploy/docs/custom-org-policy).

summary.title: Custom constraints in Cloud Deploy
summary.summary: Organization Policy now supports custom constraints for more granular control over Cloud Deploy resources.
